info.title: Rift Finance API
info.description:
## About Rift Finance

Rift Finance is a comprehensive Web3 infrastructure platform providing blockchain wallet operations and payment infrastructure across multiple chains.

### Key Features

- **Multi-chain Wallet Services**: Non-custodial wallet operations across 10+ blockchains including Ethereum, Polygon, Base, Arbitrum, and more
- **Payment Infrastructure**: Create and manage payment links, invoices, and merchant services
- **Fiat On/Off-Ramps**: Seamless conversion between crypto and fiat currencies with support for African markets (Nigeria NGN, Kenya KES)
- **Secure Authentication**: Multiple authentication methods including email, phone, and external ID with OTP verification
- **Transaction Management**: Send transactions, track history, and calculate fees across supported chains
- **Notification System**: Push notification subscriptions for transaction updates
- **Proxy Wallet & Signing**: Sign transactions and messages without exposing private keys
- **Deposit Tracking**: Monitor and manage crypto deposits

### Authentication

This API uses two-tier authentication:
1. **API Key** (X-API-Key header): Required for all endpoints - identifies your project
2. **Bearer Token** (Authorization header): Required for user-specific operations - identifies the authenticated user

### Supported Chains

Ethereum, Polygon, Base, Arbitrum, Optimism, BNB Smart Chain, Avalanche, Lisk, Berachain

### Supported Tokens

USDC, USDT, ETH, BTC, MATIC, BNB, WBERA, LSK, and more

### Base URL

`https://api.riftfi.xyz/api/v1`

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: API key for initializing the Rift SDK for the project.

SendOtpRequest.description: Must provide either a phone number or an email.

VerifyOtpRequest.description: Must provide a verification code and either a phone number or an email.

TransactionRequest.description: Requires base transaction details and one of the authentication methods.
